creator: mi@mail.virtual-estates.net
text:
This upgrades the software slightly -- to version 2.1.1 from 2.1.
	The build procedure is improved to use parallel build (-j 2 will
	help even on single CPU machines) and to avoid linking some object
	files which are avilable in the library into bzz -- on of the utility
	programs.

	The port's Makefile and pkg-plist are modified to deal gracefully
	with NOPORTDOCS -- the package creation will work either way.
